steps.title: Tallaabada koowaad: Ujeeddo iyo Ihram
steps.details:
• damco inaad cumrato, ka gasho Ixraamka Miqat, oo aad bilowdo Talbiyah.
  • Wuxuu ku dheganaa mamnuucidda Ihram, wuxuuna dhammeeyay daahirinta caadada ka hor inta uusan bilaabin caadada.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:196 iyo sannadkii laga bilaabay cibaadada laga bilaabo Miqat.

steps.title: Tallaabada Labaad: Gelida Al-Masjid Al-Haram
steps.details:
• Si deggan u gal, adigoo duco iyo is-hoosaysiin leh.
  • Ka bilow dhinaca fududeeya dhaqdhaqaaqa nabdoon ee dhex mara dadka, ka dibna u dhaqaaq dhanka aagga Tawaf.
steps.evidence: Tilmaamaha guud ee nebiyada ee ku saabsan akhlaaqda masaajidda iyo fududeynta cibaadada.

steps.title: Tallaabada saddexaad: Tawaf (toddobo wareeg)
steps.details:
• Todoba jeer ku dhex wareeg Kaabah, Tawaf ka bilaabaya xariiqda Black Stone.
  • Xasuusta Ilaahay sii wad oo iska ilaali inaad waxyeello u geysato dadka kale marka ay dadku socdaan.
  • Talo: Isticmaal abka Apple Watch si uu kaaga caawiyo inaad tirto wareegyadaada Tawaf.
  • Talo: Isticmaal abka Wear OS ee saacaddaada si uu kaaga caawiyo inaad tirto wareegyadaada Tawaf.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:29 iyo sharraxaadda la diiwaangeliyey ee ku saabsan wareegga Nabiga.

steps.title: Tallaabada Afaraad: Salaadda ka dib Tawaf
steps.details: • Tukado laba rakcadood ka dib markaad dhammayso Tawaf haddii ay suurtogal tahay adigoon waxyeello u geysanayn jameecada, ka dibna si habaysan u soco si aad u cabto biyaha Zamzam.
steps.evidence: Dhaqan si fiican loo aasaasay oo ku jira axaadiista saxda ah ee ku saabsan salaadda ka dib Tawaf.

steps.title: Tallaabada shanaad: Saie inta u dhaxaysa Safa iyo Marwah
steps.details:
• Samee Saie toddobo wareeg oo u dhexeeya Safa iyo Marwah, laga bilaabo Safa ilaa Marwah, adigoo duco iyo xasuusin samaynaya.
  • Talo: Isticmaal barnaamijka Apple Watch si uu kaaga caawiyo inaad tirto orodka Saie.
  • Talo: Isticmaal abka Wear OS ee saacaddaada si uu kaaga caawiyo inaad tirto orodka Saie.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:158 iyo sheekooyinka saxda ah sida uu rasuulku u amray.

steps.title: Tallaabada lixaad: Timo jarid ama xiirashada
steps.details:
• Raggu waxay xiiraan ama jaraan timaha, dumarkuna waxay jarjaraan qayb yar oo ka mid ah.
  • Taasna, Cumradu way dhammaataa, Ihram wuu dhammaadaa.
steps.evidence: Quran 48:27 iyo sheekooyinka dhabta ah ee la xiriira xiirashada iyo gaabinta.

steps.title: Tallaabada koowaad: Ihram iyo ujeeddada Xajka
steps.details:
• Ku gal ixraamka Miqat, u diyaar garow nooca xajkaaga, ka dibna u gudub Talbiyah.
  • Ku dhaqan qawaaniinta Ihram ilaa aad ka gaarto meelaha laga baxo Ihram.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:196 iyo caadooyinka nebiyada ee la isku raacay ee loogu talagalay bilowga Xajka.

steps.title: Tallaabada Labaad: Yawm at-Tarwiyah ee Mina
steps.details: • Maalinta siddeedaad ee Dhul Hijjah, u gudub Mina, oo tukada salaadaha wakhtigooda la ballansaday, oo u diyaar garow ruuxi ah iyo mid farsamo ahaan loogu talagalay xuska Arafah.
steps.evidence: Taxane la diiwaangeliyey oo ku saabsan caadooyinka safarka sagootinta.

steps.title: Tallaabada saddexaad: Istaagista Arafah
steps.details:
• Ku qaado maalinta sagaalaad ee Dhul Hijjah Arafah ducada, xuska Ilaahay, iyo toobad keen.
  • Kani waa tiirka muhiimka ah ee Xajka.

steps.title: Tallaabada afraad: Muzdalifah iyo ururinta dhagaxyada
steps.details: • Marka qorraxdu dhacdo, tag Muzdalifah, ku tukada Maghrib iyo Cisha, halkaas ku hoya, oo soo ururi dhagaxyo lagu tuuro Mina.
steps.evidence: Taxanaha nebiyada ka dib Arafah ee ku jira sheekooyinka saxda ah.

steps.title: Tallaabada Shanaad: Rami, Allabariga, iyo Gabayga
steps.details: • Maalinta Ciidda, marka aad tuurayso dhagaxa Jamarat al-Aqabah, samee allabaryada meesha loo baahdo, ka dibna xiir ama timahaaga jar si aad u hesho tahliilkii ugu horreeyay.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:36-37 iyo taxanaha axaadiista saxda ah.

steps.title: Tallaabada lixaad: Tawaf al-Ifadah (toddobo wareeg)
steps.details:
• Ku noqo Makka si aad u sameyso Tawaf al-Ifadah, u dhammaystirto toddoba wareeg, oo aad u ilaaliso dhaqdhaqaaq ammaan ah oo nidaamsan waqtiyada mashquulka ah.
  • Talo: Isticmaal abka Apple Watch si uu kaaga caawiyo inaad tirto wareegyadaada Tawaf.
  • Talo: Isticmaal abka Wear OS ee saacaddaada si uu kaaga caawiyo inaad tirto wareegyadaada Tawaf.
steps.evidence: Quran 22:29 iyo sharraxaadda la diiwaangeliyey ee ku saabsan wareegga waajibka ah.

steps.title: Tallaabada 7: U sheeg qofka loo baahan yahay
steps.details:
• Samee Saie marka nooca Xajkaaga uu u baahdo, adigoo ilaalinaya taxanaha iyo tirada toddobada wareeg ee u dhexeeya Safa iyo Marwah.
  • Talo: Isticmaal barnaamijka Apple Watch si uu kaaga caawiyo inaad tirto orodka Saie.
  • Talo: Isticmaal abka Wear OS ee saacaddaada si uu kaaga caawiyo inaad tirto orodka Saie.
steps.evidence: Quran 2:158 iyo ku dhaqanka shareecada ee ku saabsan cibaadada Xajka.

steps.title: Tallaabada 8: Ayyam at-Tashriq iyo Tawaf al-Wada'
steps.details:
• Joogista Mina inta lagu jiro Tashriiq si loo sameeyo caadooyinka tuurista Jamarat, ka dibna dhammaystirka Tawaf al-Wada' ka hor inta aan laga bixin Makka, marka laga reebo kuwa laga dhaafay.
  • Talo: Isticmaal abka Apple Watch si uu kaaga caawiyo inaad tirto wareegyadaada Tawaf.
  • Talo: Isticmaal abka Wear OS ee saacaddaada si uu kaaga caawiyo inaad tirto wareegyadaada Tawaf.
steps.evidence: Caadooyinka la aasaasay waxay ku salaysan yihiin hanuunka Quran iyo ku dhaqanka saxda ah ee Sunnah Nabiga.
